TOOL_REGISTRY.description: Cleaned TOOL_REGISTRY with all deprecated command keys (set-init-*, wave-plan-*) removed

ROLE_TOOL_MAP.description: Cleaned ROLE_TOOL_MAP with no references to deprecated command keys

no-deprecated-references.description: No source file may reference set-init, discuss (as standalone command), wave-plan, or new-milestone command names

existing-commands-preserved.description: All current non-deprecated commands must remain functional and present in TOOL_REGISTRY
